title: Verilator bug with signedness and arithmetic shift

features.name: arithmetic right shift of signed value with variable shift amount
features.description: Code should include an arithmetic right shift operation (>>>) on a signed operand using a variable shift amount, followed by a comparison with zero

features.name: signed input to arithmetic shift with reduction operator
features.description: Code should include a reduction operator applied to the result of a comparison between zero and an arithmetic right shifted signed value
